courseInfo.title: Introduction to Web Development
courseInfo.description: A comprehensive course covering HTML, CSS, and JavaScript fundamentals

units.title: Unit 1: HTML Fundamentals
units.description: Learn the building blocks of web pages with HTML

lessons.title: Introduction to HTML
lessons.description: Understanding HTML structure and basic tags

lessons.title: HTML Elements and Attributes
lessons.description: Learn about different HTML elements and their attributes

lessons.title: Forms and Input Elements
lessons.description: Creating interactive forms with HTML

lessons.title: Build Your First Webpage
lessons.description: Create a personal portfolio page using HTML

lessons.title: HTML Basics Quiz
lessons.description: Test your knowledge of HTML fundamentals

units.title: Unit 2: CSS Styling
units.description: Master the art of styling web pages with CSS

lessons.title: Introduction to CSS
lessons.description: Understanding CSS syntax and selectors

lessons.title: Box Model and Layout
lessons.description: Learn about the CSS box model and page layouts

lessons.title: Flexbox and Grid
lessons.description: Modern layout techniques with Flexbox and CSS Grid

lessons.title: Responsive Design
lessons.description: Creating mobile-friendly responsive layouts

lessons.title: Style Your Portfolio
lessons.description: Apply CSS styling to your HTML portfolio

lessons.title: CSS Properties Quiz
lessons.description: Test your CSS knowledge

units.title: Unit 3: JavaScript Basics
units.description: Add interactivity to your web pages with JavaScript

lessons.title: JavaScript Fundamentals
lessons.description: Variables, data types, and basic operators

lessons.title: Functions and Scope
lessons.description: Understanding functions, parameters, and scope

lessons.title: Arrays and Objects
lessons.description: Working with complex data structures

lessons.title: DOM Manipulation
lessons.description: Interacting with HTML elements using JavaScript

lessons.title: Events and Event Handlers
lessons.description: Handling user interactions with JavaScript

lessons.title: Interactive Calculator
lessons.description: Build a functional calculator with JavaScript

lessons.title: JavaScript Fundamentals Quiz
lessons.description: Test your JavaScript knowledge

lessons.title: Midterm Exam
lessons.description: Comprehensive exam covering Units 1-3

units.title: Unit 4: Advanced JavaScript
units.description: Deep dive into advanced JavaScript concepts

lessons.title: Asynchronous JavaScript
lessons.description: Promises, async/await, and AJAX

lessons.title: ES6+ Features
lessons.description: Modern JavaScript features and syntax

lessons.title: Local Storage and APIs
lessons.description: Working with browser storage and external APIs

lessons.title: Weather App Project
lessons.description: Build a weather app using an API

lessons.title: Final Exam
lessons.description: Comprehensive final exam covering all units
